criteria.name: Empathy
criteria.description: Does the candidate demonstrate genuine care for customer problems?

scores.1: Poor - Dismissive or indifferent to customer concerns
scores.3: Adequate - Shows concern but feels scripted
scores.5: Excellent - Naturally empathetic, makes people feel heard

criteria.name: Professional Tone
criteria.description: Can the candidate stay calm and positive under pressure?

scores.1: Poor - Gets frustrated or confrontational easily
scores.3: Adequate - Mostly calm but shows strain under pressure
scores.5: Excellent - Consistently warm and composed regardless of scenario

criteria.name: Troubleshooting Approach
criteria.description: Does the candidate follow a logical approach to solving issues?

scores.1: Poor - No structured approach, guesses randomly
scores.3: Adequate - Has a basic process but misses edge cases
scores.5: Excellent - Systematic, asks clarifying questions, isolates root cause

criteria.name: Resourcefulness
criteria.description: Can the candidate find solutions when the answer is not obvious?

scores.1: Poor - Gives up or escalates immediately
scores.3: Adequate - Tries a few things before escalating
scores.5: Excellent - Creative problem solver, explores multiple paths

criteria.name: Clarity
criteria.description: Can the candidate explain technical or complex topics simply?

scores.1: Poor - Uses jargon, confuses the listener
scores.3: Adequate - Generally clear but occasionally overcomplicated
scores.5: Excellent - Breaks down complex issues into simple steps

criteria.name: Written and Verbal Skills
criteria.description: Is the candidate articulate in both spoken and written communication?

scores.1: Poor - Frequent grammar issues, hard to understand
scores.3: Adequate - Clear enough for most interactions

criteria.name: Tool Familiarity
criteria.description: Is the candidate comfortable learning new support tools and systems?

scores.1: Poor - Resistant to new tools or technology
scores.3: Adequate - Willing to learn but needs significant guidance
scores.5: Excellent - Quick learner, has used multiple support platforms

criteria.name: Schedule Flexibility
criteria.description: Can the candidate work varied shifts or handle volume spikes?

scores.3: Adequate - Some flexibility with advance notice
